OkaVideoVault
💡 To download: Copy the yt-dlp command from any entry and run it in your terminal. Requires yt-dlp installed on your computer.
OkaSecure
Connection Setup
Self-hosted WebSocket. Run the server script on any PC/Pi on your network or a VPS. No third parties.
SERVER SCRIPT (run once on host machine)
# Install: npm install ws
# Run: node okatan_server.js
const WebSocket=require('ws');
const wss=new WebSocket.Server({port:8765});
const clients=new Set();
wss.on('connection',ws=>{
  clients.add(ws);
  ws.on('message',msg=>{
    clients.forEach(c=>{
      if(c!==ws&&c.readyState===1)c.send(msg);
    });
  });
  ws.on('close',()=>clients.delete(ws));
});
console.log('OKATAN Secure Line: port 8765');
● Connected

LOG SESSION —
POLICE TERMS
10 Codes
Common police / RCMP radio terminology reference.
10-00Radio communication check
10-01Signal weak
10-02Signal good
10-03Stop transmitting
10-04Affirmative / OK
10-05Relay to
10-06Busy
10-07Out of service
10-08In service
10-09Repeat last message
10-10Negative / No
10-20Location
10-21Call by phone
10-22Disregard
10-23Arrived at scene
10-24Assignment complete
10-27License / permit information
10-28Ownership information
10-29Records check
10-30Caution - subject may be dangerous
10-31Pickup
10-32Units needed
10-33Help me quick
10-34Time
10-35Off duty
10-36On duty
10-37Returning to office
10-38Fatality / sudden death
10-40Possible hit on person / vehicle / property
10-41Possible hit confirmed
10-42Surveillance category
10-43Person on parole category
10-44Person in accused category
10-45Person in elopee category
10-46Person in prohibited category
10-47Person in court action / probation category
10-48Person in refusal category
10-49Person in firearms interest police category
10-50Person in special interest police category
10-51Federal / provincial inmate record
10-52Stolen vehicle CPIC entry
10-53Crime vehicle CPIC record entry
10-60Danger / police hater
10-61Station calling identify self
10-63Dispatch tow truck
10-64Dispatch ambulance
10-65Escort prisoner or mental
10-70Are you OK?
10-71Complaint dispatch
10-72Armed robbery
10-73Alarm
10-74False alarm
10-75Meal break
10-76On portable
10-77At residence
10-81Record - violence
10-82Record - robbery
10-83Record - offensive weapon
10-84Record - break & enter
10-85Record - auto theft
10-86Record - theft
10-87Record - drugs
10-88Record - fraud
10-89Record - sex
10-90Record - other criminal code
10-91Record - other federal statutes
10-94Record - driving
10-95Record - arson
10-96Record - fail to appear
10-97Record - no conviction
10-99Multi-unit check stop
Canadian Criminal Code References
CC 253 / 320Impaired driving offenses
CC 264Criminal harassment
CC 266Assault
CC 267Assault with a weapon / bodily harm
CC 268Aggravated assault
CC 322Theft
CC 334Theft under / over $5000
CC 348Break and enter
CC 430Mischief

▸ WAYPOINTS
▸ OFFLINE MAPS / TILE CACHE
READY: cache current view or switch to local tile packs.
Put downloaded PNG tiles in that folder pattern. Example: okamaps-tiles/4/3/5.png. CACHE VIEW stores visible online tiles in browser storage when supported.
Conversate
LIVE CONVERSATION CAPTURE
Start records spoken words into a saved transcript. No API uses browser speech. API mode can clean/punctuate/summarize the saved text.
MODE
READY
Press START to begin.
OLD CONVERSATIONS
Language
LIVE LANGUAGE TRANSLATION
No API mode captures speech and does limited local phrase help. API mode translates live with OpenAI, Gemini, or Groq.
LANGUAGES
PROVIDER
READY
Press START to begin.
OLD LANGUAGE SESSIONS
OKATAN CORE
PROVIDER
READY
TIPS
WAKE WORD — say "Hey Katana" or just "Katana" and she'll listen for your next sentence. Works while OKATAN is on screen.
HANDS-FREE — non-stop conversation. Pause to send, speak over her to interrupt.
Quick tries: "Open the arcade." / "Remember my truck is a 2019 Tacoma." / "What do I drive?"
OKATAN VISION
Camera + AI vision. Open the camera, then ask "what am I looking at?" — or toggle Live Mode to keep the camera on for back-to-back questions about what you see.
VISION PROVIDER
LAST SCAN
No scan yet. Tap START CAMERA, then WHAT AM I LOOKING AT?
LIVE MODE — HOW IT WORKS
When ON, the camera stays open and your voice questions are answered against the current frame instead of going to the regular text-only assistant. Toggle HANDS-FREE or WAKE WORD after enabling Live Mode for a true "JARVIS, what's that?" experience.
PHILIPS HUE
Control your Hue lights from CORE — by voice or by tap. First time: tap FIND BRIDGE, then press the round button on top of your Hue bridge, then tap PAIR within 30 seconds.
BRIDGE STATUS
Not connected.
BRIDGE IP
LIGHTS
No lights yet — pair the bridge first.
ROOMS / GROUPS
No rooms yet.
PERSISTENT MEMORY
Facts OKATAN remembers about you across sessions. Stored locally in IndexedDB. Nothing leaves the device unless you ask the assistant a question.
STORED FACTS
AGENTIC TOOLS
When you talk to OKATAN with a real AI provider selected, she can call these tools on your behalf. Destructive actions ask before running.
API KEYS (session only)
Keys live in sessionStorage and are shared with the rest of OKATAN. They are cleared when the tab closes.
VOICE
Let OKATAN speak responses out loud, and pick a voice.
ENGINE
BROWSER VOICE
OPENAI VOICE
SPEED
WAKE WORD
Pick the trigger phrase(s). Comma-separated. Shorter phrases trigger faster but cause more false-positives. Default: hey katana, katana, okatan, hey okatan
Tip: wake-word and hands-free use the same mic; the system swaps between them automatically.
SYSTEM PROMPT
Personality and rules. Edit to taste.
◐ LISTENING FOR "HEY KATANA"

CONFIRM ACTION

—
